text: I feel intrigued and slightly disoriented, surrounded by glass, reflections, and the glow of technology. The meeting room looks sterile yet inviting; it calls for intellectual engagement. Moving to the next scene, the bold R+D on the wall, paired with screens and conceptual texts, pulls me into the realm of innovation and experimentation. There is creativity in the air and a sense of standing on the edge of discovery. I am both a participant and a spectator in the theater of modern thought.
